scripts.lint: bash -c 'targets=(); for target in install.ts provider plugins packages; do [ -e "$target" ] && targets+=("$target"); done; bunx oxlint "${targets[@]}"'
scripts.test: bun run --filter '*' test && node --test scripts/opencode-smoke.test.mjs scripts/sync-improve-upstream.test.mjs
scripts.check: bun run build && bun run test
